body: TUNGSTEN SMITHING -- pass 23 report. Shipped WARRANT#36 -> SLS(51)/9.65: forge-edge-2 r2 (Phase 3D dwell and bracket). Real favourable-run-length (dwell) measurement hooked into the existing RunLivingEdgeScan forward-horizon loop via a parallel DwellCell structure (kept separate from LivingEdgeCell so the WARRANT#32 ARMED-tail format stays untouched). Bucketed hazard-aging summary (tau25/tau50 analogue), honestly flagged as not yet recency-weighted -- a real, named gap. Compiled clean, identity invariant verified (only removed lines are version banners + 3 single-line calls that reappear byte-identical inside new brace blocks). Continuing to forge-edge-2 r3 (cell-informed TP/SL) next, using the new dwell data plus the existing MFE/MAE data together. No further check-ins per your instruction; will keep reporting after each warrant.
